title: klasea monardii
side_effects: Klasea monardii can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and digestive issues. Ingesting large amounts of the plant can lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, while prolonged exposure to its extracts may cause headaches and dizziness. Additionally, individuals with pre-existing medical conditions, such as kidney or liver disease, may experience worsened symptoms or interact with medications. In extreme cases, improper use of Klasea monardii can cause anaphylaxis, a severe and life-threatening allergic reaction.
